login.title: Sign in
login.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
login.registeredSuccess: Registration successful. Please check your email and verify your account before accessing workspace features.

register.title: Create account
register.name: Full name
register.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
register.passwordRules: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and special character.
register.errorPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
register.errorPasswordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
register.errorPasswordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
register.errorPasswordSpecial: Password must include at least one special character.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.success: Email verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.error: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
